stamp.title: United States 1861 1c Benjamin Franklin, Blue
stamp.summary: 1861 series Benjamin Franklin 1c blue. Perforation 12. Dealer notes indicate no grill and no watermark, which is consistent with Scott #63. The stamp appears unused with no visible cancellation.

stamp.title: United States 1861 1c Benjamin Franklin, Pale Blue
stamp.summary: 1861 series Benjamin Franklin 1c in a significantly lighter or faded blue shade compared to the first example. Dealer notes 'no grill or wm'. Perforation 12. Appears unused.
